title: Varan the Unbelievable
director: Jerry A. Baerwitz, Ishirô Honda, Motoyoshi Oda
writer: Sid Harris, Ken Kuronuma, Shin'ichi Sekizawa
actors: Myron Healey, Tsuruko Kobayashi, Clifford Kawada
plot: Heavily alerted American version of Japan's Varan. A prehistoric behemoth is unwittingly awoken from hibernation due to a U.S-Japanese military experiment for economic means on it's watery lair.
